title: Carry Cats!
description: Carry your tamed cats, kittens, and compatible variants on your shoulders.
body:
Ever wanted to bring your cat around on an adventure without risking it getting hurt?
Carry Cats lets you carry your tamed cats on your shoulders.

## Features
- Configurable pickup keybind. Default pickup key: B.
- Default drop key for shouldered animals: G.
- Shoulder cats purr and meow while carried.
- Supports baby cats.
- More Mob Variants compatibility on supported versions.
- Alex's Caves raycat compatibility on Forge 1.20.1.
- Works on both client and server installs.

If you want another Minecraft version or another compatibility target, leave a comment on [CurseForge](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/carry-cats).
